title: create_space_full bumps Space and SpaceMember state_seq on INSERT OR IGNORE no-ops
description: store.rs create_space_full uses INSERT OR IGNORE for both the space and creator membership rows but always calls bump_state_seq('Space') and bump_state_seq('SpaceMember') after the transaction commits, even when the INSERT OR IGNORE is a no-op (space already exists); same class of bug as nie-kef6.24 and nie-kef6.25 applied to the create_space_full path — spurious state token increments cause clients to unnecessarily re-fetch
